container_cpu_usage_seconds_total.help: Cumulative cpu time consumed by the container in core-seconds.

container_fs_reads_total.help: Cumulative count of reads made on a filesystem.

container_fs_usage_bytes.help: Number of bytes that are consumed by the container on this filesystem; look-alike negative for infra_disk (node_filesystem_* name required).

container_memory_usage_bytes.help: Current memory usage, including all memory regardless of when it was accessed; look-alike negative for infra_memory (node_memory_Mem* name required).

container_memory_working_set_bytes.help: Current working set of the container in bytes.

container_network_receive_bytes_total.help: Cumulative count of bytes received over the network by the container; look-alike negative for infra_network (node_network_* name required).

node_cpu_seconds_total.help: Seconds the CPUs spent in each mode.

node_disk_io_time_weighted_seconds_total.help: The weighted number of seconds spent doing I/Os.

node_disk_read_bytes_total.help: The total number of bytes read successfully.

node_disk_reads_completed_total.help: The total number of reads completed successfully.

node_disk_writes_completed_total.help: The total number of writes completed successfully.

node_filesystem_avail_bytes.help: Filesystem space available to non-root users in bytes.

node_nf_conntrack_entries.help: Number of currently allocated flow entries for connection tracking.

node_nf_conntrack_entries_limit.help: Maximum size of connection tracking table.

node_softirqs_total.help: Total number of software interrupts serviced.

node_timex_offset_seconds.help: Time offset in between local system and reference clock.

process_cpu_seconds_total.help: Total user and system CPU time spent in seconds; look-alike negative for infra_cpu (name must be node_cpu_seconds_total).

process_max_fds.help: Maximum number of open file descriptors.

process_start_time_seconds.help: Start time of the process since unix epoch in seconds.
